title: Puli Title Track Lyrics Puli Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Puli- Title Track
Singer(s): Mano, Priyadharsini
Movie: Puli
Music: DSP

Enga Makka Enga Makka
Odi vaanga enga makka.
Enga makka onnupatta
edhirikkalaam dandanakka.

Enga Makka Enga Makka
Odi vaanga enga makka.
Enga makka onnupatta
edhirikkalaam dandanakka.

Kaaththirukka neramillada
themmaangu paadum
kaaththukkenna
kaivilangu poda

Kaththi puththi
rendum unduda
emmpaasamulla
thambi thambi
nambi nambi vaadaa

Kodumaiyellaam adipadavae
adimai ellaam vidupadavae
Kizhakku velukka
vizhiyum sivakka
ezhundhu varugudhae

yae puli puli puli puli
puli puli puli puli.
ada manni vittu
vinnai thottu
suttri varum soora puli.

yae puli puli puli puli
puli puli puli puli.
ada achcham vittu
uchcham thottu
vettri perum veera puli

AAthi sokka vandhaan Paaru
Kaatin azhagu raasave
Adi aathi
Kanni ponnu nenjil
Kaadhal kalakum rasaave

Mannai meeraamale
Vidhaum mulaikuma
Thari padaatha noolu enna
Adadai aaguma
Hey raasave raasave

Engal thaai naattaiye
Panjam vandhaaluma
Puli gugayil eli vandhu
Vaalai aatuma

Unnai nee nambi
uzhaithu paaru
Ooru thannale maaradhu
Maatram unnodu
Thodangattum thozha
Vizhikum podhu namadhu kanavu
Palika vendumey

edhirikkalaam dandanakka.

Sitham kodhikudhey
Raththam thee aaguthey
Yudham seiyya varugavendru
Satham ketkuthey
Hey raasave raasave raasave

Thittam irukanum
Thotta jeikanum
Naan thotta thittam edhum
Thotradhillaye

Vaanam eppodhum
Theerndhapogum
Vaazhvil nambikkai theerathey
Naalai nam kayyil
Vandhae theerum
valadhu kaalai yeduthu vada
Ilaya thozhaney

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys a sense of energy and motivation, encouraging listeners to embrace challenges and move forward.

How does this song fit into the movie's plot?

This track serves as a theme song, highlighting the adventurous spirit of the characters in Puli.

Who are the singers of the song?

The song features the talented vocals of Mano and Priyadharshini.

Who composed the music for this track?

The music for Puli Title Track was composed by Devi Sri Prasad.

When was the song released?

The song was released on August 2, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The Puli Title Track is a high-energy anthem that sets the tone for the adventurous narrative of Puli. It captures the essence of determination and excitement, motivating listeners to embrace their journey. The vibrant beats and dynamic vocals create an uplifting atmosphere, making it perfect for celebrations and workouts. This song not only enhances the film's storyline but also resonates with anyone looking for a boost of energy.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Puli Title Track is an electrifying anthem that perfectly encapsulates the spirit of adventure and excitement in Puli. With the dynamic vocals of Mano and Priyadharshini, paired with Devi Sri Prasad's pulsating beats, this track is sure to get your adrenaline pumping. Dive into the vibrant world of Puli and feel the energy surge through you!
stanzaMeanings: Our children, our children, come running, our children. Our children can face anything that comes their way.
Our children, our children, come running, our children. Our children can face anything that comes their way.
There is no time to wait, the song of the brave is here, let it flow.
There are two swords, one for each brother, trust in each other, don't hesitate.
All hardships will be overcome, all servitude will be released. The eastern light will rise and shine.
Hey tiger, tiger, tiger, tiger, tiger, tiger, tiger, tiger. The fierce tiger will come around after leaving the earth and touching the sky.
Hey tiger, tiger, tiger, tiger, tiger, tiger, tiger, tiger. The great tiger will rise after overcoming fear and reaching victory.
The beautiful star has come, look at its beauty. The first girl in the heart brings the taste of love.
Will the earth be shaken? Will it give birth? What will happen to the thread that cannot be pulled?
Hey star, star.
If our motherland faces trouble, will the tiger come and dance?
Trust in yourself and work hard. The place won't change. Change begins with you. Our dreams must be fulfilled.
Hey tiger, tiger, tiger, tiger, tiger, tiger, tiger, tiger. The fierce tiger will come around after leaving the earth and touching the sky.
Hey tiger, tiger, tiger, tiger, tiger, tiger, tiger, tiger. The great tiger will rise after overcoming fear and reaching victory.
Our children, our children, come running, our children. Our children can face anything that comes their way.
The anger is rising, the blood is boiling. The call for battle is being heard.
Hey star, star, star.
There must be a plan to win. I have no plan to lose.
The sky will always clear up. In life, hope should not fade. Tomorrow will bring a solution, take the right path, my young friend.
Hey tiger, tiger, tiger, tiger, tiger, tiger, tiger, tiger. The fierce tiger will come around after leaving the earth and touching the sky.
Hey tiger, tiger, tiger, tiger, tiger, tiger, tiger, tiger. The great tiger will rise after overcoming fear and reaching victory.
